      23            6 :     function void build_phase(uvm_phase phase);
      24            6 :         super.build_phase(phase);
      25            6 :         m_axis_agent = axi4_stream_agent::type_id::create("m_axis_agent", this);
      26            6 :         m_axil_agent = axi4_lite_agent::type_id::create("m_axil_agent", this);
      27            6 :         m_predictor  = lliu_predictor::type_id::create("m_predictor", this);
      28            6 :         m_scoreboard = lliu_scoreboard::type_id::create("m_scoreboard", this);
      29            6 :         m_coverage   = lliu_coverage::type_id::create("m_coverage", this);
      30              :     endfunction
      31              : 
      32            6 :     function void connect_phase(uvm_phase phase);
      33            6 :         super.connect_phase(phase);
      34              :         // Stream monitor → predictor (to compute expected inference result)
      35            6 :         m_axis_agent.m_monitor.ap.connect(m_predictor.analysis_export);
      36              :         // Predictor → scoreboard expected FIFO
      37            6 :         m_predictor.result_ap.connect(m_scoreboard.expected_fifo.analysis_export);
      38              :         // AXI-Lite monitor → scoreboard actual FIFO (result reads)
      39            6 :         m_axil_agent.m_monitor.ap.connect(m_scoreboard.actual_fifo.analysis_export);
      40              :         // Stream monitor → coverage collector
      41            6 :         m_axis_agent.m_monitor.ap.connect(m_coverage.analysis_export);
      42              :     endfunction
      43              : endclass
